step1.title: Paste Your Document
step1.description: Copy your text or upload a document.

step2.title: Auto-Anonymize
step2.description: custix detects and replaces personal data in under 5 seconds.

step3.title: Use AI Safely
step3.description: Use the anonymized text with any AI — no data protection risk.

step4.title: Auto Re-Identify
step4.description: custix automatically reinserts the original data into the AI response. Done in seconds.

items.q: Does my data get sent to the cloud?
items.a: No. custix runs 100% locally on your computer. No data leaves your device — not for anonymization, not for processing.
Yes. Since all data is processed locally, there is no data transfer to third parties. Anonymization happens before any AI tool is used.

items.q: What types of data are detected and anonymized?
items.a: custix automatically detects names, addresses, case numbers, tax IDs, dates of birth, and other personally identifiable information.

items.q: Does custix work with ChatGPT and Claude?
items.a: Yes. custix is AI-agnostic — you can use the anonymized text with any AI tool, including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and others.
Start with a free 14-day trial. Plans start at €49/month for individual users.
After receiving the AI response, custix automatically reinserts the original data — all locally, no cloud involved.

lawyers.h1: Anonymize Client Data — Use AI Safely as a Lawyer
lawyers.subtitle: Use AI. Protect Clients.
lawyers.intro: As a lawyer, you are bound by attorney-client privilege. Using cloud-based AI like ChatGPT or Claude with client data can violate this obligation — and lead to serious professional consequences.
pains: AI tools send data to US servers — a GDPR violation
Attorney-client privilege prohibits sharing client data with third parties
Manual redaction takes 30-60 minutes per document
Without AI, you fall behind firms that already use it
solutions: 100% local processing — no data leaves your computer
Compatible with all AI tools: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini & more

taxAdvisors.h1: Anonymize Client Data — Use AI Safely as a Tax Advisor
taxAdvisors.subtitle: Use AI. Protect Clients.
taxAdvisors.intro: As a tax advisor, you are bound by tax secrecy obligations. Using cloud-based AI with client data can violate these obligations and lead to legal consequences.
pains: Cloud AI tools violate tax secrecy obligations
GDPR prohibits transferring personal data to US servers
Manual anonymization wastes valuable processing time
Without AI support, your competitiveness decreases
solutions: Tax filings and opinions anonymized in seconds
Local processing — no data transfer to third parties
Works with all major AI tools

hr.h1: Anonymize Applicant Data — Use AI in Recruiting, GDPR-Compliant
hr.subtitle: Use AI. Protect Applicant Data.
hr.intro: In recruiting, sensitive applicant data is processed — names, addresses, photos, dates of birth. Using AI tools with this data requires GDPR-compliant processes.
pains: Applicant data is especially sensitive personal data
Cloud AI tools violate GDPR when processing applicant data
Anonymous screening is cumbersome without technical solutions
Diversity requirements demand objective, anonymized evaluations

items.title: Anonymous Application Screening
items.description: AI-powered pre-selection without bias from personal data.

items.title: Optimize Job Postings
items.description: Use AI for better job ads — with anonymized reference data.

items.title: Interview Preparation
items.description: AI-generated interview guides based on anonymized applicant profiles.

healthcare.h1: Anonymize Patient Data — Use AI Safely in Healthcare
healthcare.subtitle: Use AI. Protect Patient Data.
healthcare.intro: In healthcare, patient data is protected by medical confidentiality and GDPR. AI can revolutionize medical work — if the data remains protected.
pains: Patient data is especially sensitive under GDPR Article 9
Medical confidentiality prohibits sharing with cloud services
Manual anonymization of medical records is time-intensive
Without AI, documentation and case analysis lack efficiency
solutions: AI-powered documentation without data protection risks

items.title: Create Medical Reports
items.description: AI-powered report generation with anonymized patient data.

items.title: Case Analysis
items.description: Use AI for differential diagnosis — without revealing patient data.

items.title: Medical Documentation
items.description: Efficient documentation with AI — GDPR-compliant and local.

insurance.h1: Anonymize Claims Reports — Use AI Safely in Insurance
insurance.subtitle: Use AI. Protect Customer Data.
insurance.intro: In the insurance industry, claims reports contain highly sensitive personal data. AI can accelerate claims processing — but only with proper data protection.
pains: Claims reports contain sensitive customer and medical information
Cloud AI use violates GDPR and insurance supervision law
Manual anonymization slows down claims processing
Without AI, case processing takes unnecessarily long
solutions: AI-powered claims assessment without data protection risks
Faster case processing with AI support

items.title: Claims Assessment

items.description: Use AI patterns for fraud detection — without exposing customer data.
